name: gitmode
description: Git server on Cloudflare Workers — Zig WASM engine with SIMD

scripts.build:wasm: cd wasm && zig build wasm -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall && mkdir -p ../src/wasm && wasm-metadce --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --graph-file exports.json zig-out/bin/gitmode.wasm -o ../src/wasm/gitmode.dce.wasm && wasm-opt -Oz --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int ../src/wasm/gitmode.dce.wasm -o ../src/wasm/gitmode.wasm && rm ../src/wasm/gitmode.dce.wasm
scripts.build:wasm-core: cd wasm && zig build core -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall && mkdir -p ../src/wasm && wasm-metadce --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --graph-file exports-core.json zig-out/bin/gitmode-core.wasm -o ../src/wasm/gitmode-core.dce.wasm && wasm-opt -Oz --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory ../src/wasm/gitmode-core.dce.wasm -o ../src/wasm/gitmode-core.wasm && rm ../src/wasm/gitmode-core.dce.wasm
scripts.build:wasm-all: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:wasm-core
